title: Filipino-Style Bistek
description: A classic Filipino dish made with marinated beef steaks, cooked to perfection and served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and black pepper to make the marinade.
2. Add the sliced beef to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
4. Remove the beef from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Add the beef to the preheated skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
6. Transfer the beef to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
7. Serve the sliced beef with a side of steamed vegetables, garnished with chopped scallions and a squeeze of calamansi juice if desired.
